let S : Set (Set α) := (𝓒 : Set (Set α))
  have h₁ : IsNIPWith d S := h𝐂
  have h₂ : IsNIPWith d (restrictFiniteSymmDiffComponent 𝓒 : Set (Set ↑((⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ A ∈ 𝓒, A))) := by
    -- Use the fact that the restriction of an NIP family to a subset is NIP
    have h₃ : (restrictFiniteSymmDiffComponent 𝓒 : Set (Set ↑((⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ A ∈ 𝓒, A))) ⊆ (Set.range (fun (s : Set α) => (s : Set ↑((⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ A ∈ 𝓒, A))) ) := by
      -- Prove that the restricted component is a subset of the range of the natural map
      intro s hs
      simp only [restrictFiniteSymmDiffComponent, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hs ⊢
      rcases hs with ⟨A, hA, rfl⟩
      refine' ⟨A, _⟩
      <;> simp_all [Set.ext_iff]
      <;> aesop
    -- Use the fact that the range of the natural map is NIP
    have h₄ : IsNIPWith d (Set.range (fun (s : Set α) => (s : Set ↑((⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ A ∈ 𝓒, A))) : Set (Set ↑((⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ A ∈ 𝓒, A))) := by
      -- Use the fact that the range of the natural map is a subset of the original family
      refine' h₁.subset _
      intro s hs
      simp only [Set.mem_range] at hs
      rcases hs with ⟨t, rfl⟩
      <;> simp_all [Set.ext_iff]
      <;> aesop
    -- Conclude that the restricted component is NIP
    exact h₄.subset h₃
  exact h₂
